---
title: "Trevor Sullivan"
image: "files/profile-pic.jpg"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:trsullivan@ucsd.edu
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/trevdensull
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com/rsm-trsullivan
---

MSBA student at UC San Diego with experience in analytics, hospitality, and client-facing projects. I’m interested in using data to solve practical business problems, with a focus on financial analysis, operations, and strategy.
